allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m['name']\) for m in d.get\('models',[]\)]")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/ask -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"question\\": \\"what are the requirements for bedrooms?\\"}")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($pid8000 = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($pid8000\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid8000 -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $pid8000" } else { Write-Host "Port 8000 is free" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($pid8000 = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($pid8000\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid8000 -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $pid8000"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } else { Write-Host "Port 8000 is free" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess; Write-Host "Still listening: PID=$\($conn.OwningProcess\) Name=$\($p.Name\)"; $p | Stop-Process -Force } else { Write-Host "Port 8000 is free" })
